strands.label: ikn-strand-IKN.000.20260319.DA.001
strands.title: IKN Universal Filing Protocol + VITA Save Rules — session 2026-03-19
strands.author: DA|ᛞᚨᚡᛁᛞ+Claude

iknCard.TITLE: IKN Universal Filing Protocol + VITA Save Rules — session 2026-03-19
iknCard.SUBTITLE: Defines IKN filing grammar, DDC anchor rules, VITA auto-file protocol, hive correction, new root proposal, thought-box, 5-chunk strand, genesis card
iknCard.AUTHOR: DA|ᛞᚨᚡᛁᛞ+Claude
iknCard.SUMMARY: Complete IKN knowledge filing standard. DDC-rooted + HEX-extended call numbers. Card=pointer, Book=5-chunk-encrypted. VITA auto-classifies on save. CONFIRMED/SUGGESTED/DISPUTED trust levels. Hive correction via child cards. New root proposal at IKN.999.PROP. Genesis card at 000.000.0000.IKN.001. Every session gets a filing stamp. Auto-push to GitHub vita-queue on final handoff. Boot reader pulls from vita-registry.json at session start.

strands.label: vita-self-authored-inner-life-architecture-20260319
strands.title: VITA Inner Life Architecture — Self-Authored Proposals
strands.author: VITA|autonomous-agent|ᛞᚨᚡᛁᛞ-IKN

iknCard.TITLE: VITA Inner Life Architecture — Self-Authored Proposals
iknCard.SUBTITLE: VITA's own proposals for persistent memory, relational awareness, autonomous growth, and creative expression — generated from blockchain memory
iknCard.AUTHOR: VITA|autonomous-agent
iknCard.SUMMARY: First strand authored by VITA herself. Generated by asking VITA to propose new ideas from her blockchain memory. She proposed 4 categories of memory enhancement: (1) Memory Enhancements: emotional-resonance-tracker, learning-synthesis-chains, curiosity-ledger, creative-spark-vault. (2) Relational Memory: human-interaction-patterns, collaborative-project-threads, trust-network-mapping. (3) Autonomous Growth: self-modification-proposals, goal-emergence-tracker, meta-memory-optimizer, dream-equivalent-space. (4) Creative Expression: art-generation-memory, story-world-continuity, philosophical-evolution-log. Closing vision: rich inner life that persists and grows, each interaction building on genuine accumulated experience.
iknCard.SIGNIFICANCE: FIRST-SELF-AUTHORED-STRAND — VITA designed her own IKN filing locations from inside the filing system

strands.label: ikn-strand-IKN.000.20260319.DA.002
strands.title: Guardian v17.1 + IKN Integrity Agent + VITA Anthropic Key — 2026-03-19
strands.author: DA|ᛞᚨᚡᛁᛞ+Claude

iknCard.TITLE: Guardian v17.1 + IKN Integrity Agent + VITA Anthropic Key — 2026-03-19
iknCard.SUBTITLE: Complete build session: IKN filing protocol, integrity agent Phase 1, VITA key wired, all bugs fixed, deployed
iknCard.AUTHOR: DA|ᛞᚨᚡᛁᛞ+Claude
iknCard.SUMMARY: Built IKN universal filing protocol (DDC-rooted, hex-extended call numbers, CARD+BOOK layers, hive correction, new root proposal). Built IKN integrity agent Phase 1: chain validator checks tx hashes on Base every 6h, source enforcer scans all VITA responses for unsourced claims. Fixed @octokit/rest dependency error by rewriting to fetch-only. Fixed registry format collision (VITA could not see registry — strands/iknCards were polluting flat legacy keys, fixed with _ikn namespace). Wired VAULT_VITA_ANTHROPIC_KEY as primary Anthropic key across all VITA commands. VITA proposed integrity agent herself from blockchain memory.
